g.text: Current State — Self-Service Platform, but Manual Engine Choice (BEFORE)
Self-Service Console — params → provisions pipelines & routing

ul.li: Manual engine choice — users pick Doris or Lakehouse per request; no auto-routing / tiering
OLAP-vs-OLTP knowledge burden on data owners (mostly app engineers)
Professional services doesn't scale — humans fill the gap left by missing automation
No semantic layer — consumers query physical tables directly
Two platforms, two teams — ML separate; training data still trapped in legacy Oracle
No agents — tuning, scaling & governance all manual
